items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, advancing the national cyber security strategy and signalling continued investment in protecting Australian organisations. Separately, Scamwatch is warning Australians about two active scam types: fake food delivery messages and deceptive online relationships — both designed to steal money or personal information.

Although overall phishing volumes have dropped globally, attacks are becoming more sophisticated, so staying alert remains important. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected message about a food delivery or an online contact asks you for money, stop and verify through official channels before responding or clicking any links.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's government launches second phase cyber security strategy, directly shaping national digital defense.
